title: Decorative
description:
This mod is a simple mod that adds many decorative blocks!
its still in its early stages, so their isn't much, but currently their is:
Tables for all wood types
Basalt tiles
Polished Basalt tiles
Calacite bricks
And britanium
body:
This mod is a simple mod that adds many decorative blocks!
its still in its early stages, so their isn't much, but currently their is:
Tables for all wood types
Basalt tiles
Polished Basalt tiles
Calacite bricks
And britanium

I will make sure to add more in the future!
